purpose: Select the PDF source used for page mapping, OCR alignment, quotation verification, and English node extraction.

vol_1.supplementary_reprint_pdf: vol_1/raw_pdf/mathematical principles of natural philosophy 英 第一卷扫描.pdf

vol_2.supplementary_reprint_pdf: vol_2/raw_pdf/mathematical principles of natural philosophy 英 第二卷扫描.pdf

rules: Use existing Internet Archive OCR first for search and initial extraction.
Use vol_*/pdf/motte_1729_vol*.pdf as the canonical scan source for page mapping, OCR alignment, quotation verification, English node extraction, and fallback OCR.
Treat vol_*/raw_pdf/ as supplementary modern reprint references only.
Do not mix reprint pagination or Cajori revisions into the 1729 node source.
Do not overwrite, rename, move, or delete either PDF set.
